hero.subheadline: We design and code modern, fast, SEO-optimized websites so your business gets more leads and sales every day.

items.title: Fast delivery
items.body: From kickoff to launch in 14 days.

items.title: Mobile-first
items.body: We design mobile first. That is where your clients are.

items.title: Direct support
items.body: You talk to whoever builds your site. No call centers.

items.title: No lock-in
items.body: You own the code from day one.

items.quote: Calls went up 40% in the first month. The site looks like a much bigger company.
items.author: Marta Iglesias

items.quote: Professional and fast. Delivered ahead of schedule.
items.author: Jorge Vilaró

items.quote: The site is very fast and Google ranks it well for my area.
items.author: Andrea Soto

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: What people ask us most before starting.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: From €590 for the Essential pack. See all three packs at /services.
Between 7 and 21 business days depending on the pack. Average is 14.

items.q: Who owns the domain and the code?
items.a: You. We hand over credentials and the repository when we finish.
Yes, the first year. From the second year onward it is ~€60/year at cost.

items.q: What if I don't like it?
items.a: Every pack includes revision rounds so we can adjust whatever you need.

finalCta.title: Ready for your new site?
finalCta.body: Tell us about your project. We reply within 24h.

hero.title: Services and packs
hero.subtitle: No fine print. No surprises. You decide how far we go.

extras.title: Extra services à la carte
extras.subtitle: When you need to go one step further.

items.a: Yes. You start with one and add extras when you need them.
Yes, 50% at kickoff and 50% before launch.

items.q: What if I need something custom?
items.a: Tell us and we'll put together a fixed quote.

hero.title: Portfolio
hero.subtitle: Some of the projects we have shipped.

hero.title: People behind every website.
hero.subtitle: A young team that designs, builds and ranks websites for real businesses.

howWeWork.title: We work as a team, not in silos.
howWeWork.body: Every project goes through design, development and cross-review. No outsourced stages, no losing context between weeks. The same team is with you from start to finish: the person you talk to in the kickoff is the same one polishing the last detail before launch.
bullets: No templates: every site is designed from scratch.
No subcontracting: the Tuagenciaweb team does it all.
No vague timelines: we commit to a date and meet it.

story.title: How we started
story.body: Tuagenciaweb was born after seeing too many abandoned, slow or ugly small business websites. We design every project from scratch, no templates, modern code.

items.title: Fixed timeline
items.body: We tell you when we deliver. If we miss it, we discount it.

items.title: You own everything
items.body: Domain, code, and data. No lock-in.

items.title: Transparency
items.body: We show you every step before moving on.

items.title: Real support
items.body: You talk to whoever codes your site.
